title: Non-Resident Indian (NRI) Taxation & Advisory
shortDescription: Cross-border tax planning, DTAA relief, Form 15CA/15CB certification, capital gains on Indian assets, and repatriation assistance.
fullDescription: Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) and foreign entities facing tax obligations in India navigate a complex intersection of the Income Tax Act, Double Taxation Avoidance Agreements (DTAA), and FEMA regulations. Anil Puneet and Associates provides comprehensive NRI tax advisory and compliance services. We assist non-residents with determining statutory residential status, claiming DTAA tax credits, issuing Form 15CA/15CB certificates for foreign remittances, and managing Indian income tax filings.
scopeOfWork: Residential status determination under Section 6 of the Income Tax Act and Deemed Residency rules
Form 15CA & Form 15CB preparation and CA certification for foreign outward remittances
Capital gains tax planning and computation on sale of Indian immovable property, shares, and mutual funds
Lower/NIL Tax Deduction Certificate applications under Section 195/197 for property sales
Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) relief claims, Tax Residency Certificate (TRC) analysis, and Form 10F filings
Repatriation of funds from NRO to NRE / overseas bank accounts under RBI's USD 1 Million Scheme
Income Tax Return filing for NRIs receiving taxable income, house property rent, or capital gains in India
Tax advisory on returning NRIs (RNOR status) and global income disclosure rules

process.title: Residential Status & DTAA Analysis
process.description: Analyzing physical presence physical day counts, visa status, overseas tax residency, and applicable DTAA provisions.

process.title: Tax Liability & Withholding Computation
process.description: Calculating Indian tax liability, applicable TDS under Section 195, capital gains indexation, or DTAA concessional rates.

process.title: Form 15CA/15CB Issuance & Filing
process.description: Issuing CA Certificate (Form 15CB) and completing Part A/B/C/D of Form 15CA on the tax portal.

process.title: ITR Filing & Bank Repatriation Support
process.description: Submitting NRI annual income tax returns and liaising with authorized dealer (AD) banks for transfer.

deliverables.title: Form 15CB CA Certificate & Form 15CA Receipts
deliverables.description: Statutory certificates required by AD Banks for processing outward foreign remittances.

deliverables.title: NRI Income Tax Return (ITR-2) Filing Docket
deliverables.description: Filed annual return reporting Indian source income, capital gains, and DTAA relief claimed.

deliverables.title: Section 197 Lower TDS Certificate
deliverables.description: Official order issued by Assessing Officer allowing lower TDS deduction on property sales by NRIs.

deliverables.title: DTAA Tax Position Memorandum
deliverables.description: Technical memorandum analyzing Tax Residency Certificate (TRC), Form 10F, and foreign tax credit (FTC).

faqs.question: What rate of TDS applies when buying property from an NRI seller?
faqs.answer: Under Section 195 of the Income Tax Act, buyers purchasing immovable property from an NRI must deduct TDS at the rate of 20% (plus applicable surcharge and cess) on total capital gains or gross sale consideration unless a Lower TDS Certificate under Section 197 is obtained.

faqs.question: When is Form 15CB required for outward foreign remittance?
faqs.answer: Form 15CB (a certificate by a practicing Chartered Accountant) is required for foreign remittances chargeable to tax in India where the payment exceeds statutory thresholds or where DTAA benefits are being claimed.

faqs.question: What is RNOR status and how does it benefit returning NRIs?
faqs.answer: Resident but Not Ordinarily Resident (RNOR) status allows returning NRIs to maintain tax-exempt status in India for foreign-sourced income for up to 1 to 3 financial years after moving back to India.

keyHighlights: Specialized expertise in cross-border tax treaties (DTAA) and FEMA remittance rules
Fast-track issuance of Form 15CA/15CB certificates for bank transfers
Proven experience in obtaining Section 197 Lower TDS certificates for NRI property sales
Complete compliance support for returning NRIs (RNOR planning)
